title: christella zeylanica
intro: Christella zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon spikemoss or Christella, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Christella zeylanica contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds that have been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and combat infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its health benefits, which include treating digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and is also used in traditional remedies for fever and rheumatism.
